summary: Great audience recording that captures a spectacular second set despite a weaker first half.
review: The reviewer rates this tape five stars, calling the recording "great" and praising the second set as some of the best Dead they've heard. While they note the first set is not as strong, the overall impression is highly positive, especially for fans who value an outstanding second‑set performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Single five‑star review highlights excellent recording quality and a standout second set; limited data prevents high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the tape "great" but provides no detailed technical comments; no issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as mediocre, while the second set is praised as one of the best performances, indicating a strong upward arc in the concert.
